content.text:
Now I can clearly see the structure around atom 2 (C:2). Based on the zoomed view, I can identify the following neighbour atoms covalently connected to C:2:

## Neighbour Atoms of C:2 (Atom Index 2):

1. **Atom Index 3**: N (Nitrogen) - this is the nitrogen atom in the central ring
2. **Atom Index 1**: C (Carbon) - this carbon is connected to N:0 (terminal nitrogen)
3. **Atom Index 17**: C (Carbon) - this carbon is part of the carbonyl group (connected to O:18)

## Summary:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 1 | C |
| 3 | N |
| 17 | C |

**geomconf_index**: 257

The carbon atom at index 2 is sp2 hybridized and forms three covalent bonds - one with nitrogen (N:3), and two with carbon atoms (C:1 and C:17).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 2, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
